summary: Verified new features: Pamphlet-style Loyalty Program tier cards and Hindi translation across the app. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Loyalty Program - Pamphlet-style tier cards displayed for Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum
Loyalty Program - Each tier card has distinct gradient styling (amber/orange for Bronze, slate/gray for Silver, yellow/amber for Gold, violet/purple for Platinum)
Loyalty Program - 'Most Popular' badge displayed on Gold tier card
Loyalty Program - Colorful stat cards: Points Value (yellow), Min. Redeem (green), Max Redeem (blue), Point Expiry (purple)
Loyalty Program - Tier cards show points required, multiplier, and benefits list
Hindi Translation - Sidebar menu items translate correctly (डैशबोर्ड, एनालिटिक्स, पॉइंट ऑफ सेल, आइटम, इन्वेंटरी, etc.)
Hindi Translation - Theme toggle shows 'थीम' with 'लाइट/डार्क' badge
Hindi Translation - Tagline shows 'खुदरा विकास के लिए बनाया गया'
Hindi Translation - Section dividers in Hindi (बिक्री, खरीद, पार्टी और खाता, छूट और ऑफर, मानव संसाधन प्रबंधन, सेटिंग्स)
Hindi Translation - Loyalty Program page fully translated (पॉइंट्स मूल्य, न्यूनतम रिडीम, अधिकतम रिडीम, पॉइंट समाप्ति, सदस्यता स्तर, लीडरबोर्ड)
critical_code_review_comments: LoyaltyProgramPage.js: PamphletTierCard component well-structured with TIER_CONFIG for gradient styling
LoyaltyProgramPage.js: 'Most Popular' badge correctly applied to Gold tier (isPopular={tierName === 'gold'})
LanguageContext.js: Comprehensive translations object with 100+ keys for both 'en' and 'hi' languages
App.js: Sidebar correctly uses t() function from useLanguage() hook for all menu labels
App.js: Theme toggle correctly displays translated 'थीम' and 'लाइट/डार्क' labels
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new features verified: 1) Pamphlet-style loyalty tier cards with rich gradients and 'Most Popular' badge on Gold tier. 2) Hindi translations working across the app - set localStorage.setItem('language', 'hi') and reload to test. All sidebar items, theme toggle, tagline, and Loyalty Program page translate correctly.

loyalty_program_pamphlet_cards.tier_cards_displayed: WORKING - Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum cards with distinct gradients
loyalty_program_pamphlet_cards.most_popular_badge: WORKING - Pink/rose badge on Gold tier
loyalty_program_pamphlet_cards.stat_cards: WORKING - Points Value (yellow), Min. Redeem (green), Max Redeem (blue), Point Expiry (purple)
loyalty_program_pamphlet_cards.tier_benefits: WORKING - Each card shows points required, multiplier, and benefits list

hindi_translation.sidebar_menu_items: WORKING - All navigation items translated (डैशबोर्ड, एनालिटिक्स, etc.)
hindi_translation.tagline: WORKING - Shows 'खुदरा विकास के लिए बनाया गया'
hindi_translation.section_dividers: WORKING - बिक्री, खरीद, पार्टी और खाता, etc.
hindi_translation.loyalty_page: WORKING - Full translation of stat cards, tabs, and descriptions
